texts.label: text
texts.orig: Klang Valley East Metro - Package V3
texts.text: Klang Valley East Metro - Package V3

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Package V3 closed January at overall actual progress of 31.5% against planned 32.0% . Overall project health remains Amber . Viaduct works continued to advance steadily, but Cheras North enabling and utilities activities were slower than planned due to unresolved authority comments on diversion methodology and limited night work access.
texts.text: Package V3 closed January at overall actual progress of 31.5% against planned 32.0% . Overall project health remains Amber . Viaduct works continued to advance steadily, but Cheras North enabling and utilities activities were slower than planned due to unresolved authority comments on diversion methodology and limited night work access.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Commercially, the package remains within manageable range but early signals show pressure on utilities relocation and interface-related design coordination. Quality performance was broadly acceptable, although NCR-014 on pier reinforcement alignment remains under corrective action.
texts.text: Commercially, the package remains within manageable range but early signals show pressure on utilities relocation and interface-related design coordination. Quality performance was broadly acceptable, although NCR-014 on pier reinforcement alignment remains under corrective action.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Completed pier cap works at six viaduct locations.
texts.text: Completed pier cap works at six viaduct locations.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Substantially completed bored piling for Pandan Gateway Station.
texts.text: Substantially completed bored piling for Pandan Gateway Station.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Installed temporary traffic decking at one crossing to unlock future station activities.
texts.text: Installed temporary traffic decking at one crossing to unlock future station activities.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Closed out most structural shop drawing comments for Pandan Gateway concourse zone.
texts.text: Closed out most structural shop drawing comments for Pandan Gateway concourse zone.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The diversion package at Cheras North Station did not progress at the planned rate because the authority requested additional method statement clarification for one crossing. This restricted access to the permanent works zone and delayed downstream station activities.
texts.text: The diversion package at Cheras North Station did not progress at the planned rate because the authority requested additional method statement clarification for one crossing. This restricted access to the permanent works zone and delayed downstream station activities.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: NCR-014 was raised following a pier reinforcement alignment discrepancy. The site team completed immediate corrective work and expects closure in February after QAQC verification.
texts.text: NCR-014 was raised following a pier reinforcement alignment discrepancy. The site team completed immediate corrective work and expects closure in February after QAQC verification.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The systems interface package remains partially approved only. Civil and systems comments were resolved internally, but client-side comments on cable route access and room handover sequence are still outstanding.
texts.text: The systems interface package remains partially approved only. Civil and systems comments were resolved internally, but client-side comments on cable route access and room handover sequence are still outstanding.

texts.orig: Approved VO to date: RM 18 million

texts.text: VO-017 : Additional interface coordination and phased drawing submission effort

texts.text: extended design coordination effort for interface approval

texts.orig: No lost-time injury recorded this month.
texts.text: No lost-time injury recorded this month.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: One lifting near-miss was reported and briefed during toolbox talks.
texts.text: One lifting near-miss was reported and briefed during toolbox talks.

texts.orig: NCR-014 remains open with corrective work completed on site.
texts.text: NCR-014 remains open with corrective work completed on site.
